Community: CPC Data Operations; CPC Glossary Stewards
Notes: The single Data Steward: connects sources, profiles, runs identification; stewards Production, Traceability and Plant Operations terms
Manufacturing engineer; stewards Parts & BOM and Suppliers & Purchasing terms incl. Part Number and Unit Cost
Quality lead; stewards Quality & Inspection and Nonconformance (all CDE) terms; owns the CoC and MRB stories
Stewards Shipments & Customers and Records & Documents terms; owns the recall story
Storage & custodian persona: creates/ingests data sources (the bulk loader needs this role), monitors storage utilization; the app's Govern custodian slot maps from this role
Data Developer persona: authors the Workshop 4 business rules and metadata/domain rules (in PDC v11 this role owns Business Rules; note the Admin role cannot create them)
Data User persona: reads metadata, searches, views dashboards and data assets for their line of business - cannot edit the glossary or connect sources
Business User persona (lightest tier): views the business glossary and policies only - no data-source access; the contrast case to Mia (Data User)
Creates users, defines custom properties, manages workers and licence (in the lab, catalog.admin carries all seven roles)
